name: PUBLIC SVC CO IND INC
source: Public Service Co. of Indiana (later PSI Energy / Cinergy / Duke Energy). A utility added in the single June 1976 S&P 500 restructuring batch. S&P Dow Jones Indices stamps the 1976 batch as 1976-06-30 (confirmed for sibling 1976 utilities Florida Power & Light and Duke Power on Wikipedia's S&P 500 constituents table). Chen-Noronha-Singal's 1976-07-01 is one day off the real S&P date. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies

name: FLORIDA POWER & LIGHT CO
source: Florida Power & Light, now NextEra Energy (NEE). Wikipedia/S&P Dow Jones Indices current S&P 500 constituents table lists NextEra Energy (NEE) date-added = 1976-06-30, the actual S&P effective date for the 1976 restructuring batch (CNS dataset's 1976-07-01 is one day off). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies

name: DISNEY WALT PRODUCTIONS
source: Walt Disney Productions (DIS), a current S&P 500 member added in the June 1976 restructuring. The 1976 batch carries the S&P date 1976-06-30 (confirmed for sibling 1976 additions Florida Power & Light/NextEra, Duke Power/Duke Energy, and INA/Cigna on Wikipedia's constituents table). Disney's specific 1976-06-30 stamp was not separately retrievable, but it was part of the same June 1976 batch. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies

name: MCLEAN TRUCKING CO
source: McLean Trucking Co., a transportation firm added in the July-1976 S&P 500 restructuring that cut the transport bucket to 20 names. Same single June 1976 batch event for which S&P Dow Jones Indices records the date 1976-06-30 (per Wikipedia constituents table for surviving 1976 additions). No standalone date source (firm later defunct/merged). WRDS 1976 turnover note: https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/classroom/sp500-introduction/over-time/

name: WESTERN BANCORPORATION
source: Western Bancorporation (later First Interstate Bancorp), one of the 40 financial stocks added in the 1976 restructuring that first admitted banks to the S&P 500. The batch's actual S&P date is 1976-06-30 (confirmed for sibling 1976 firms on Wikipedia/S&P DJI constituents table). CNS's 1976-07-01 is one day off. https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/classroom/sp500-introduction/over-time/ ; https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies

name: DUKE POWER CO
source: Duke Power Co., now Duke Energy (DUK). Wikipedia/S&P Dow Jones Indices current S&P 500 constituents table lists Duke Energy (DUK) date-added = 1976-06-30 — the actual S&P effective date for the 1976 batch (CNS dataset's 1976-07-01 is one day off). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_S%26P_500_companies

name: EMERY AIR FGHT CORP

Firm later acquired, no standalone date source. https://wrds-www.wharton.upenn.edu/classroom/sp500-introduction/over-time/
